vBRIEFInfo.description: Ship the canonical orchestrator AGENTS.md preamble template plus four companion AGENTS.md rules surfaced during the 2026-05-07 multi-agent session: (1) REST-by-default for read-only gh calls (GraphQL bucket conservation), (2) no Draft<->Ready re-toggling within a single review cycle, (3) rate-limit-aware throttle (probe gh api rate_limit -- live, uncached -- before GraphQL-heavy ops, switch to REST when remaining < 500), (4) dispatcher-level lifecycle hygiene -- workers must be all-or-nothing on their dispatch envelope; mid-scope user-approval gates must be split into two dispatches because a worker that finishes its tool loop while reporting `paused` is observed as `succeeded` (terminal) and its agent_id becomes unreachable. Plus a fifth correction to the existing #884 ghx section: ghx is NOT a full drop-in passthrough for gh -- `ghx api` accepts a single positional arg and writes (POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE) must fall through to gh; ghx wins for cached read-only GETs only. Heavy content lives in the new templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md so AGENTS.md gains a small additive section + meta-rule pointing at the template. Single PR closing #954, draft only. Targets v0.26.2 quick-follow (NOT v0.26.1; the v0.26.1 cut is mid-flight at the time of this scope and CHANGELOG ownership conflict + release-rewind cost rule out inclusion).

plan.title: feat(meta): canonical orchestrator preamble + REST-default / no-Draft-retoggle / rate-limit-throttle / dispatcher-lifecycle-hygiene rules (#954)

narratives.Problem: Orchestrators (this conversation, swarm-skill dispatchers, monitor agents) dispatch implementation sub-agents with ad-hoc preambles that omit one or more of: AGENTS.md read mandate, #810 vBRIEF gate walkthrough, PowerShell 5.1 non-ASCII rule (#798), pre-pr / review-cycle skill mandates, REST-by-default for gh reads, no-Draft-retoggle, rate-limit-aware throttle, sub-agent spawn rules per #727, mandatory DONE message even on early exit. The 2026-05-07 multi-agent session surfaced concrete recurrence patterns (GraphQL bucket exhaustion mid-cascade because workers polled via `gh pr view --json`; release agents looping on Draft<->Ready toggles burning GraphQL budget; one worker self-terminating with `succeeded` while its message said `holding for reply`, breaking the implied resume channel). Without a canonical preamble these recurrences re-fire on every fresh dispatch.
narratives.Overview: Ship one PR with three deliverables. (1) NEW templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md -- canonical orchestrator preamble (~150-250 lines) covering all the rules above with concrete examples. Heavy content lives here so AGENTS.md stays compact. (2) AGENTS.md additive section under `## SCM tooling -- prefer ghx (#884)` with the four new MUST rules + meta-rule that orchestrators dispatching implementation sub-agents MUST include the canonical preamble (link to template). Also a small correction to the existing ghx section: ghx is a cached read-only GET proxy, NOT a full passthrough -- `ghx api` is single-arg only; writes (POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE) must fall through to gh. (3) CHANGELOG.md `[Unreleased]` -> Added bullet for the new template, Changed bullet for the AGENTS.md rules. PR labelled `adoption blocker` (create label first via REST if missing, color e74c3c).
narratives.Constraint: DO NOT touch CHANGELOG.md section structure -- the v0.26.1 release agent owns the [Unreleased] -> [v0.26.1] promotion at the time of this scope. Only ADD entries to existing [Unreleased] subsections. DO NOT touch ROADMAP.md (release-time concern). DO NOT touch scripts/, tasks/, or any skill SKILL.md beyond cross-references. DO NOT toggle PR Draft state more than once. DO NOT use `gh pr view --json` / `gh pr ready` / `gh pr update-branch` (GraphQL); use REST equivalents. DO NOT merge. DO NOT ready (DRAFT only). PowerShell 5.1 non-ASCII rule (#798) governs all file edits -- use Python pathlib for any read/write touching em dashes / arrows / smart quotes. Wall-clock cap: 2.5h once unblocked. The v0.26.1 release agent shares our identity; defer push/PR/review-cycle until v0.26.1 publishes to avoid GraphQL contention. Local-prep work (template + AGENTS.md + CHANGELOG draft + task check) is fine to do in parallel with the parked release agent because it is offline.
narratives.Outcome: templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md (new, ~150-250 lines): canonical orchestrator preamble. AGENTS.md: small additive section under the existing #884 ghx block adding four MUST rules (REST-by-default, no-Draft-retoggle, rate-limit-throttle, dispatcher-lifecycle-hygiene) plus the meta-rule pointing at the new template, plus a one-paragraph correction clarifying ghx is read-only-cache-friendly (writes must use gh). CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased]: Added bullet for the template, Changed bullet for AGENTS.md rules, both referencing #954. New `adoption blocker` GitHub label (color e74c3c) created via REST if missing and applied to the PR. task check green. DRAFT PR with `Closes #954` in body. Review-cycle ran end-to-end with cap 3 iterations.
narratives.Test: tests/content/test_agents_md_preamble.py (new): regex-asserts AGENTS.md contains the four new MUST rule tokens (REST-by-default, no Draft re-toggling, rate-limit-aware throttle, dispatcher lifecycle hygiene), the meta-rule token (`templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md`), and the ghx-write-fallback correction. tests/content/test_agent_prompt_preamble_template.py (new): asserts templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md exists, is non-empty, and contains the named sections (Read AGENTS.md / vBRIEF gate / PowerShell 5.1 / pre-pr + review-cycle / REST-by-default / no-Draft-retoggle / rate-limit-throttle / sub-agent spawn / DONE message / dispatcher lifecycle hygiene). task check green.
narratives.DesignChoice: TEMPLATE-OVER-INLINE: heavy preamble content lives in templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md, not inline in AGENTS.md, so future revisions of the preamble do not bloat AGENTS.md. AGENTS.md gets the meta-rule + brief rule summary; orchestrators link to the template. Mirrors the existing templates/agents-entry.md pattern (#636) where AGENTS.md describes the contract and the template carries the canonical bytes. ADDITIVE-NOT-RESTRUCTURING: AGENTS.md edits are small additions under the existing `## SCM tooling -- prefer ghx (#884)` heading; no section reorder, no restructure of the existing rules. Lowest possible diff surface for review.

items.title: templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md (new): canonical orchestrator preamble covering AGENTS.md read mandate, #810 vBRIEF gate walkthrough, PowerShell 5.1 non-ASCII rule (#798), pre-pr + review-cycle skill mandates, REST-by-default for gh reads, no Draft re-toggling, rate-limit-aware throttle (probe gh api rate_limit -- live, uncached; switch to REST when graphql.remaining < 500), sub-agent spawn rules per #727, dispatcher lifecycle hygiene (workers all-or-nothing; split scope at every approval gate), mandatory DONE message even on early exit. Each rule with a concrete example.

AGENTS.md: new MUST rule under existing #884 ghx section -- REST-by-default for read-only gh calls; forbid `gh issue view --json`, `gh pr view --json`, `gh pr ready`, `gh pr update-branch` (GraphQL). Use `ghx api` (REST, cached) instead.
AGENTS.md: new MUST rule -- at most one Draft<->Ready toggle per review cycle; once Ready, stay Ready unless a P0 demands otherwise (GraphQL conservation).

AGENTS.md: new MUST rule -- before any GraphQL-heavy operation, probe `gh api rate_limit` (live, uncached; not the cached `ghx api` form) and inspect graphql.remaining; if < 500 switch to REST equivalents or batch+wait; concrete decision tree.

AGENTS.md: new MUST rule -- dispatcher-level lifecycle hygiene: workers must be all-or-nothing on dispatch envelope; mid-scope user-approval gates require two-dispatch structure; cite the lifecycle-event reality (succeeded is terminal, agent_id unreachable). Per scope expansion via comment 4399553752 on issue #954.
AGENTS.md: new meta-rule -- orchestrators dispatching implementation sub-agents MUST include the canonical preamble (link to templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md).

AGENTS.md: one-paragraph clarification under existing #884 ghx section -- ghx is a cached read-only GET proxy, NOT a full passthrough; `ghx api` accepts a single positional arg, so writes (POST/PATCH/PUT/DELETE) must fall through to gh. Surfaced 2026-05-07 during this scope's local-prep.

tests/content/test_agents_md_preamble.py (new): regex asserts the four new MUST rule tokens, the meta-rule token, and the ghx-write-fallback correction. tests/content/test_agent_prompt_preamble_template.py (new): asserts templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md exists, is non-empty, and contains all named sections.

CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased]: Added bullet for templates/agent-prompt-preamble.md, Changed bullet for AGENTS.md rules. Both reference #954. NO section restructure (release agent owns [Unreleased] -> [v0.26.1] promotion).
task check passes (validate + lint + test + verify:encoding + verify:branch).
Create `adoption blocker` GitHub label via REST if missing (color e74c3c); apply to the PR after open.

Push branch feat/954-orchestrator-preamble; open DRAFT PR via REST mutation (`gh api -X POST repos/deftai/directive/pulls --input <file>`); body includes `Closes #954`. NO ready, NO merge. Defer this step until v0.26.1 publishes.
Run skills/deft-directive-review-cycle/SKILL.md (cap 3 iterations); REST-only polling; greptile-errored -> retry once via @greptileai then halt. Defer until #954 PR is open.
